phrases.intent_en: Ask about the opening hours of the garden
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ouvre le jardin ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel uhr OOV-ruh luh zhar-DAN
phrases.cultural_note: Jardin Darcy is a public garden in the center of Dijon, open from early morning to dusk.

responses.english: The garden is open from 7am until sunset.
responses.phonetic: luh zhar-DAN eh oo-VAIR duh set uhr oh koo-SHAY doo soh-LAY
responses.local: Le jardin est ouvert de sept heures au coucher du soleil.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if entry to the garden is free
phrases.cultural_note: Jardin Darcy is a free public garden maintained by the city of Dijon.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a playground for children
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une aire de jeux pour enfants ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL oon AIR duh ZHOO poor ahn-FAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The garden has a small playground area. It's a popular spot for families, especially on weekend afternoons.

responses.english: Yes, there's a playground at the back of the garden.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah oon AIR duh ZHOO oh fohn doo zhar-DAN
responses.local: Oui, il y a une aire de jeux au fond du jardin.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the entrance to the park from Rue de la Liberté
phrases.text_local: Où est l'entrée du jardin depuis la Rue de la Liberté ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lahn-TRAY doo zhar-DAN duh-PWEE lah roo duh lah lee-bay-rah-SYON
phrases.cultural_note: There are several entrances to Jardin Darcy, with the main one on Rue de la Liberté near the shopping district.

responses.english: The main entrance is on Place Darcy, right in front of you.
responses.phonetic: lahn-TRAY prahn-see-PAL eh soor lah plahs dar-SEE, zhoost duh-VAHN voo
responses.local: L'entrée principale est sur la place Darcy, juste devant vous.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are benches to sit on
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des bancs pour s'asseoir ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day BAHN poor sah-SWAHR
phrases.cultural_note: The garden has plenty of benches and shaded areas. It's a popular rest stop in the city center.

responses.english: Yes, there are benches throughout the garden.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah day BAHN par-TOO dahn luh zhar-DAN
responses.local: Oui, il y a des bancs partout dans le jardin.
